goals: Explore available unit conversion categories to understand what types of conversions are supported
Get detailed help on the speed category for converting vehicle speed measurements in a car accident case
Convert speed from mph to km/h for a traffic accident analysis
Convert distance from miles to kilometers for calculating accident scene measurements

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and methodical, trying to apply unit conversions to tort law case analysis. May be unfamiliar with technical tools and approaches them with some hesitation.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands tort law concepts well but has limited experience with technical conversion tools. Does not know tool names or internal APIs.

end_condition: The user has successfully converted the necessary measurements for their tort law case analysis and understands how to use the conversion tools for future reference.
